vBRIEFInfo.description: Story C of #1378 -- deterministic Gate 0: scripts/preflight_story_start.py + task verify:story-ready.

plan.title: feat(scripts): scripts/preflight_story_start.py Gate 0 + verify:story-ready (#1378 Story C)

narratives.Description: Add a deterministic-tier preflight gate (scripts/preflight_story_start.py, exposed as task verify:story-ready) that inspects working-tree state, target vBRIEF lifecycle state, and the dispatch envelope's `## Allocation context` section (Story A schema), returning the framework three-state exit (0 ready / 1 not ready / 2 config error). Wire it as Gate 0 of the pre-start_agent gate stack and document it in AGENTS.md (+ templates/agents-entry.md mirror per #1309).
narratives.UserStory: As a swarm dispatcher, I want a machine-checkable Gate 0 that inspects the allocation-context consent token directly, so the #1371 carve-out becomes load-bearing instead of prose-trusted and the next #954-class failure is foreclosed.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Add scripts/preflight_story_start.py mirroring the shape of scripts/preflight_implementation.py / scripts/preflight_branch.py (pure stdlib, evaluate() separated from CLI, --json variant, UTF-8 self-reconfigure at main). It inspects: git status --porcelain (clean OR branch-start-allowed), target vBRIEF in active/ with plan.status==running, and the `## Allocation context` section when present (solo path when absent; valid-cohort path when dispatch_kind: swarm-cohort + non-null allocation_plan_id + batching_rationale; config error on malformed/missing required fields). Three-state exit 0/1/2. 2. Wire task verify:story-ready in tasks/verify.yml. 3. Update AGENTS.md `## Session-start ritual` / pre-start_agent gate stack (#1149) to insert Gate 0 ahead of vbrief:preflight; mirror into templates/agents-entry.md per #1309 and extend tests/content/test_agents_entry_contract.py marker list. 4. Add tests/cli/test_preflight_story_start.py covering dirty-tree, missing-allocation-context (solo), valid-cohort (batched), and invalid-allocation-context (malformed/missing fields) exit codes. 5. CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry referencing #1378.
narratives.Traces: Traces to GitHub issue #1378 Story C. Gate-stack position per AGENTS.md `## Session-start ritual (#1149)`; exit-code convention per scripts/preflight_implementation.py (#810) and scripts/preflight_branch.py (#747).

narrative.Acceptance: scripts/preflight_story_start.py exists, exposes evaluate() + a --json CLI, and returns 0 (ready) / 1 (not ready: dirty tree or invalid cohort consent token) / 2 (config error: malformed/missing allocation-context fields), matching the framework gate convention.
narrative.Traces: Traces to #1378 Story C -- preflight script.

items.title: task verify:story-ready wired as Gate 0 + AGENTS.md doc (mirrored)

narrative.Acceptance: tasks/verify.yml exposes verify:story-ready; AGENTS.md pre-start_agent gate stack documents Gate 0 ahead of vbrief:preflight; templates/agents-entry.md mirrors it and tests/content/test_agents_entry_contract.py marker list is extended (#1309).
narrative.Traces: Traces to #1378 Story C -- task wiring + gate-stack doc.

items.title: Behavioral tests for the four cases

narrative.Acceptance: tests/cli/test_preflight_story_start.py covers dirty-tree, missing-allocation-context (solo path), valid-cohort (batched path), and invalid-allocation-context (malformed JSON / missing fields), each asserting the documented exit code; passes under task check.
narrative.Traces: Traces to #1378 Story C -- behavioral tests.

references.title: Issue #1378: first-class allocation-plan reference in dispatch envelope (post #1371 deterministic-tier enabler)

task verify:story-ready wired; AGENTS.md gate stack documents Gate 0; template mirror + contract test updated
behavioral tests cover the four cases
